hero.title: Launch Your Business with Premier Software Development 🚀
hero.description: We are going to help you make it.

learnMore.title: Do you have a website?
learnMore.description:
A Mobile App? E-commerce? Personal Portfolio or Business Land Page with CMS? A SaaS? Or maybe a PaaS? Or would you like to have one, but you don’t have the budget to get a team of developers bringing to life your project?
We can take care of all your software development needs. We'll help you start building your business!

featureSections.title: How we can help
featureSections.paragraph: Here in GABO we can help you design not only your software but also your business, and give you advise about marketing or entrepreneurship in general. This is how we work.

features.title: We get to know you
features.description: We want to know you! We need to know your needs, goals, and tastes in order to develop a work plan and deliver you with the best services...

features.title: We help you materialize your dreams!
features.description: If we match, we start working together!

features.title: Pause at any moment
features.description: Do you like how we work? Let's keep working! You are not convinced? No worries, you can look for developers somewhere else, and we'll wish you the best.

features.title: Always committed to your budget and deadlines.
features.description: After getting to know your needs we'll estimate how much and how long it's going to take for us to make it real...

features.title: We keep in touch.
features.description: You can reach us at any moment, and we'll solve your doubts ASAP. We will also be asking for your feedback...

features.title: Send it and get paid.
features.description: Finish your product and start selling and getting customers!

pricingSection.title: Our Pricing Plan
pricingSection.description: Pick what suits best for you, if you don't find it contact us anyways, we might arrange something! 😉
